heading: Jurisdiction and scope
label: 2290 Jurisdiction and scope

children.text: within the United States and within waters subject to the jurisdiction of the United States; or

children.label: A
children.text: an offender or a victim is a national of the United States (as that term is defined under section 101(a)(22) of the Immigration and Nationality Act ();8 U.S.C. 1101(a)(22)1So in original. There probably should be an additional closing parenthesis.1

children.label: B
children.text: the activity involves a vessel in which a national of the United States was on board; or

children.label: C
children.text: the activity involves a vessel of the United States (as that term is defined under section 2 of the Maritime Drug Law Enforcement Act (46 U.S.C. App. 1903).2See References in Text note below.21

children.heading: .—Scope
children.label: b .—Scope
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall apply to otherwise lawful activities carried out by or at the direction of the United States Government.
